composites.title: Lakeside Reverie at Plitvice in Autumn
composites.prompt: A young solo female model with long blonde hair and Korean facial features is seated sideways on a rustic wooden chair at the edge of one of Plitvice Lakes iconic wooden walkways, Croatia, during peak autumn. One leg is elegantly crossed, she leans back with one hand resting near a small espresso cup placed on the weathered railing, the other hand lightly touching her hair, her gaze drifting dreamily toward the cascading turquoise waterfalls beyond. She wears a navy and white Breton stripe top, high-waisted wide-leg cream trousers, a red silk neck scarf, and nude ballet flats. Ultra-detailed, photorealistic, cinematic editorial style.

composites.title: Cherry Blossom Parisian Reverie
composites.prompt: Photorealistic editorial fashion photograph. A young woman with long blonde hair and Korean facial features is seated sideways on a delicate white bistro chair beneath a breathtaking tunnel of cherry blossom trees in full bloom, Japan. Ultra-detailed, photorealistic, cinematic Vogue editorial style, 16:9 aspect ratio.

composites.title: Salar de Uyuni Sunrise Bolivia
composites.prompt: Aerial view of Salar de Uyuni salt flat at sunrise in Bolivia, perfect mirror reflection of dramatic pink and orange sky, endless white crystalline salt crust stretching to the horizon, small cactus islands emerging from the reflective surface, golden light rays breaking through clouds, ultra-wide landscape photography, photorealistic, 8K

composites.title: Zhangjiajie Pillar Mountains Sunrise China
composites.prompt: Dramatic sunrise over the towering sandstone pillar formations of Zhangjiajie National Forest Park, China — ethereal mist swirls between the towering quartzite sandstone pillars as golden dawn light illuminates the vertical cliffs and lush green vegetation cascading down the rock faces. Dusty pink and orange sky transitions to soft blue, ethereal layered mist in the valleys, a single hiker silhouette on the distant viewpoint for scale. Ultra-wide landscape photography, photorealistic, dramatic, ultra-detailed, 8K

sceneries.title: Waitomo Glowworm Caves New Zealand
sceneries.prompt: Breathtaking wide angle view inside the magical Waitomo Glowworm Caves in New Zealand, showcasing thousands of bioluminescent glowworms illuminating the cave ceiling like a starry night sky. Soft blue-green and ethereal cyan light casting a magical glow on the dark limestone walls and calm underground river below. A silhouetted boat with a few visitors drifts quietly on the water. Elegant stalactites and stalagmites visible in the dim growworm light. Mysterious, photorealistic, ultra-wide, dramatic contrast, cinematic, 8K

sceneries.title: Khyargas Lake White Cliffs Mongolia
sceneries.prompt: Dramatic landscape photograph of Khyargas Lake with striking white chalk cliffs rising from turquoise-blue water in western Mongolia. Golden hour light illuminates the stark white limestone formations creating strong contrast against the deep blue sky and water. Vast steppe landscape in the background, a few nomadic gers visible in the distance. Professional photography with dramatic lighting, vivid colors, stunning composition. Ultra-high resolution, cinematic quality, National Geographic style.
